steps.title: Read the concession
steps.content: The underlined phrase concedes that mass extinctions can be considered abrupt on a geological timescale. The sentence then qualifies that point by saying they still unfold over thousands or millions of years.

steps.title: Match the perspective shift
steps.content: Choice A wrongly focuses on uncertainty about bivalves. Choice C makes the phrase support the carbon dioxide cause. Choice D invents an unresolved question about the beginning of the extinction. The remaining choice captures the shift between two time perspectives. The answer is B.
